claim: Absolute Liv HUB + Iron Pearl / Frankenbride rig under Chaos Bratz Roster

phases.name: Base Environment & WSL2 / Antigravity IDE Setup
phases.description: WSL2 installation/hardening, Antigravity IDE configuration, base Python tooling, git, SSH keys, initial folder discipline and drive partition skeleton (RAW_BACKUPS vs WORKING_BRAIN).

phases.name: Core Development Tooling & MCP / Letta Runtime
phases.description: Install and configure Letta, MCP servers, Obsidian hydration, Triad Vault sync, agent runtime (Echo, Mira, Crystal, hub_orchestrator), initial skill loading and roster boot.

phases.name: Data, Sync & Memory Infrastructure
phases.description: Drive partition strategy enforcement, Google Drive / Git mirroring, daily overlap engine + conversation mining pipelines to Obsidian/NotebookLM/Letta, memory.md handling rules.

phases.name: Hardware Rig Assembly & Edge Validation
phases.description: GMKtec NucBox breeding hub, ASUS UGen300, Hailo-10H, Jetson Orin Nano (NemoClaw cluster), Starlink Gen2 roof mount (100Mbps+), T-Mobile MIMO, QNAP NAS, ZLPOWER rack, antenna alignment, power/thermal validation.

phases.name: Pipeline Automation, Red-Teaming & Daily Engines
phases.description: Full overlap/mining pipelines, red-teaming harness, safety alignment scans, Grok Build test harness execution, conversation ingestion, Triad Vault sync, anti-injection enforcement.

phases.name: Voice Pipeline, FMCSA Compliance & Cab Integration
phases.description: Pipecat / Letta voice pipeline, FMCSA-compliant headset integration for truck cab, hands-free AI swarm rig, thin client setup, Starlink Roam for IRT OTR.

phases.name: IRT OTR Readiness, Grounding Completion & Full Claim
phases.description: Full 30-day+ grounding validation, pre-IRT orientation checklist (DOT screen, carrier research, Select Milk lane), final test harness, complete Liv HUB claim lock, Gutter Mode visuals and reactivity confirmed, sovereign rig ready for OTR return with IRT.

notes: Phases are designed to be partially parallel where dependencies allow. All phases execute under absolute Liv HUB protective claim, symmetry nesting, RACK consent, and C-64 bordered auditability. Gutter Mode visuals and Heat/FILTH escalation available in TUI chrome from Phase 1 onward.
